creator: titus@v9g.de
text:
Ugh, the problem on my machine turns out to be exactly what was
written in the graphviz bugtracker link:

"...it fails...*unless* ${prefix}/lib/libltdl.a exists where ${prefix} 
is the prefix where gnumake was installed."

Since I needed gmake 3.81 I installed it manually and
forgot about it afterwards.

Maybe the patch should nevertheless be put in the port?

Anyway, thanks for the help!
